query: SELECT pr.id, pr.partner_id, pr.name, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as room_count, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as qr_count FROM peppr_properties pr LEFT JOIN peppr_rooms r ON r.property_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN peppr_qr_codes q ON q.property_id = pr.id GROUP BY pr.id, pr.partner_id, pr.name ORDER BY pr.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2C19S8bbifd7Eo1.072c8bfadc68 --database jKkhr27mS3Co8cU4bKqLWb --execute SELECT pr.id, pr.partner_id, pr.name, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as room_count, COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) as qr_count FROM peppr_properties pr LEFT JOIN peppr_rooms r ON r.property_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN peppr_qr_codes q ON q.property_id = pr.id GROUP BY pr.id, pr.partner_id, pr.name ORDER BY pr.name;
